description: Adds or updates a bar chart on the workbench canvas from static series data (CanvasBlock with type bar and Graph content). Use after you have computed or aggregated categories and numeric values; this does not run a query by itself. Reuse the same `identifier` to refresh a chart in place. `layout` is required for grid position and size.

identifier.description: Unique key for this canvas block (e.g. `error_rate_by_service`).

layout.description: Required grid placement (CanvasBlock.Layout). All of x, y, w, and h must be set.

x.description: Column index of the top-left cell (0-based).

y.description: Row index of the top-left cell (0-based).

props.description: Chart configuration (WorkbenchJobResult.CanvasBlock.Graph): a display title plus labeled numeric points.

title.description: Short chart title shown above the bars (e.g. `5xx responses by route`).

data.description: Series values (WorkbenchJobResult.DataPoint). Each item is one bar; order is preserved left-to-right.

label.description: Category label for the x-axis (e.g. service name, status code bucket).

value.description: Numeric magnitude for the bar height (counts, rates, percentages, etc.).
